title: [release-1.42] tests: remove dependencies on online apt repositories
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind failing-test 

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Rework places to avoid installing packages using apt as part of tests. Use ubi10 where we need to be able to call setcap, setfattr, and getfattr from the same image.

#### How to verify it

Updated integration tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Manual cherry pick from #6791.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
LGTM
Test issues look flakey, I restarted.

> The testing-farm jobs are failing on not finding policy.json . Also, is log handling mixing up stderr and stdout ?

Per [bats(7)](https://github.com/bats-core/bats-core/blob/master/man/bats.7.ronn#the-run-helper), the `run` function that underpins most invocations of anything that we want to check the output of sets "$output" to the combined stdout and stderr of the command it ran.

> The testing-farm jobs are failing on not finding policy.json . Also, is log handling mixing up stderr and stdout ?

If I'm reading the status log at https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/9951908a-b1a1-4192-a88f-dcf4b4d6bd59/ right, it's installing aardvark-dns, netavark, SELinux policy,  and a containers-common built off of their respective main branches, and those include changes made in concert with container-libs changes that aren't in this branch.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
